curation.synopsis: Three linked campaigns sweep across the embattled Medina Worlds as a tide of daemon-worshipping renegades descends on the sub-sector. Inquisitor Obadiah Roth races to recover a cache of ancient artefacts before the traitors can turn their power against the Imperium. On a drowned frontier world, the Guardsmen of the 31st Riverine are dragged into a brutal counter-insurgency that curdles into something far darker. And far from any aid, the Blood Gorgons find their own ranks rotting from within as a mysterious plague grips one of their recruiting worlds, forcing the warband toward the brink of destruction. Gathered here, these intertwined stories trace heroes and villains alike through a corner of the galaxy where mercy is the rarest commodity of all.

flags.reason: out-of-print omnibus with thin online coverage; secondary POV identities verified only at low confidence

collects.basis: Bastion Wars omnibus follows the trilogy
